name: langsmith-evals
description: Engenharia, Pytest deterministico e auditoria de evals agenticos LangSmith-first: datasets, evaluators, experiments, backtests e gates.

interface.shortDescription: Projeta, executa e audita evals no LangSmith.
interface.longDescription: Usa LangSmith como control plane para datasets, experiments, feedback e backtests. Inclui Engineer, Pytest Engineer para oraculos deterministicos e Auditor independente.
defaultPrompt: /langsmith-evals desenhe e execute o eval deste agente
/langsmith-evals implemente os contratos deterministicos com pytest
/langsmith-evals audite os experiments e emita GO/NO-GO
